name: quioteframework/telemetry-dashboard
description: TUI dashboard + minimal OTLP/HTTP receiver for Quiote (`telemetry:dashboard` console command). A standalone process, not part of the request path.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/telemetry-dashboard/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here. NOTE: TelemetryDashboardCommand deliberately keeps the Quiote\Console\Command\ namespace shared with the kernel's other built-in commands (About/RoutesList/CacheWarmup/New), resolved the same longest-prefix-first way as the Quiote\Telemetry\ split in quioteframework/telemetry-otel. Console\Application still constructs this command eagerly (guarded by class_exists on this package's own command class) rather than through the generic plugin-command-contribution seam, because bin/quiote builds Console\Application BEFORE any Quiote::bootstrap() call -- a plugin-contributed command only appears once a bootstrap has already run in the same process. bin/quiote now attempts a best-effort, silent pre-bootstrap of its own (Quiote\Console\AppDirResolver, covering the 'Command contribution boundary'), which covers mcp:serve when an app is discoverable -- but this command must ALSO work with zero app/bootstrap at all (a bare `bin/quiote telemetry:dashboard` outside any app directory), which the deferred seam still cannot do, so it stays eagerly registered.
